reference: It is not uncommon for a child with a congenital anomaly to have another congenital anomaly as well. Even if the newborn has an anorectal fistula, no immediate intervention or surgery is advisable, so I think that you can wait for your appointment on Tuesday. The ultimate remedy for these conditions will be surgery, or perhaps a series of surgeries.
text: It is not uncommon for a child with a congenital anomaly to have another congenital anomaly as well. Even if the newborn has an analrectal fistula, no immediate intervention or surgery is advisable. So I think that you can wait for your appointment on Tuesday. The ultimate remedy for these conditions will be surgery, or perhaps a series of surgeries.
